response.justification: Exceptional match with 15+ years of full-stack experience significantly exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Currently employed at re:cinq as Staff Software Engineer working directly with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AI-agent infrastructure—aligned with both primary stack and specialized AI development requirement. Strong track record of delivering high-performance, scalable systems at companies handling millions of requests per second. Minor gaps in Nest.js and Vitest specifics are negligible for a senior engineer with demonstrated testing expertise and ability to master new frameworks quickly.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience with multiple senior/staff roles; currently working in TypeScript, Node.js, React stack at re:cinq with direct AI-agent infrastructure involvement
Proven expertise across entire required tech stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, TDD/testing, Git, plus secondary languages (Java, C++)
Strong communication and knowledge-sharing demonstrated through conference talks (FOSS4G 2019), full-day workshops on web internals, and professional education (Selenium certification course)
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being primary stack requirement; resume shows strong Node.js expertise but not this specific framework
Vitest and Playwright not mentioned by name; testing expertise is evident but specific framework familiarity unclear
PostgreSQL and MySQL not explicitly listed; MongoDB demonstrated but relational database experience not clearly documented
